cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is holding a perfect sit-stay. A large digital timer on the screen is prominently displaying '30 Segundos'. The dog is focused and patient. The trainer is standing calmly a few steps away. Indoor setting. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera slowly orbits around the dog, showing its unwavering stillness from all angles as the timer holds steady.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer walks out of the room, disappearing behind a doorway, while the dog remains in its stay position. The dog looks towards the door but does not move. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera stays on the dog, capturing its moment of decision and its choice to remain in the stay, even with the owner out of sight.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer walks back into the room, smiling proudly. The dog is still in the exact same spot. The trainer gives a massive jackpot of treats and praise. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A celebratory shot with slow-motion and a shower of virtual confetti as the jackpot reward is given, emphasizing the huge success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: An infographic showing a progress bar labeled 'Paciência'. The bar animates from empty to full as the timer goes from 5s to 1min. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The progress bar fills up with a satisfying animation, and a star appears at the end when it reaches '1min'.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog staying calmly on its mat while the owner answers the front door to a visitor. A real-world application of a solid stay. Text overlay: 'Fica: A Base da Confiança e Liberdade'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A wide shot showing the entire scene, demonstrating the dog's reliability in a practical situation. The text fades in with a strong, trustworthy font.
